concept.description: Annotates compiled SaltMarcher view-layer types for InspectorEntry enforcement.
concept.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type) WHERE type.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\..*' WITH type, coalesce(type.sourceFileName, '') AS sourceFileName, split(type.fqn, '.') AS segments SET type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerType, type.viewBucket = CASE WHEN size(segments) >= 6 AND segments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND segments[3] = 'primitives' AND segments[4] = 'mapcanvas' AND (sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'MapRenderScene.java' OR sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'CanvasPointerEvent.java') THEN 'SUPPORT_VALUE' WHEN size(segments) >= 6 AND segments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND (sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'ViewModel.java' OR sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'PresentationModel.java' OR sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'ContentModel.java' OR sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'ContributionModel.java') THEN 'MODEL' WHEN size(segments) >= 6 AND segments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'IntentHandler.java' THEN 'HANDLER' WHEN size(segments) >= 6 AND segments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'ViewInputEvent.java' THEN 'VIEW_INPUT_EVENT' WHEN size(segments) >= 6 AND segments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'PublishedEvent.java' THEN 'PUBLISHED_EVENT' WHEN size(segments) >= 6 AND segments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'InspectorEntry.java' THEN 'INSPECTOR_ENTRY' WHEN size(segments) >= 6 AND segments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'View.java' THEN 'VIEW' WHEN size(segments) >= 5 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'Binder.java' THEN 'BINDER' WHEN size(segments) >= 5 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND (sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'ViewModel.java' OR sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'PresentationModel.java' OR sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'ContributionModel.java' OR sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'ContentModel.java') THEN 'MODEL' WHEN size(segments) >= 5 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'Contribution.java' THEN 'CONTRIBUTION' WHEN size(segments) >= 5 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'IntentHandler.java' THEN 'HANDLER' WHEN size(segments) >= 5 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'ViewInputEvent.java' THEN 'VIEW_INPUT_EVENT' WHEN size(segments) >= 5 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'PublishedEvent.java' THEN 'PUBLISHED_EVENT' WHEN size(segments) >= 5 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'View.java' THEN 'VIEW' ELSE 'LEGACY' END, type.relativePath = CASE WHEN type.sourceFileName IS NULL OR type.sourceFileName = '' THEN replace(type.fqn, '.', '/') + '.java' WHEN type.name IS NULL OR type.name = '' OR NOT type.fqn ENDS WITH '.' + type.name THEN replace(type.fqn, '.', '/') + '.java' ELSE replace(substring(type.fqn, 0, size(type.fqn) - size(type.name) - 1), '.', '/') + '/' + type.sourceFileName END RETURN type AS ViewLayerType

constraint.description: Each InspectorEntry source file owns exactly one top-level InspectorEntry type.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerType {viewBucket: 'INSPECTOR_ENTRY'}) WHERE NOT type.fqn CONTAINS '$' WITH type.relativePath AS source, coalesce(type.sourceFileName, '') AS sourceFileName, collect(DISTINCT type.name) AS typeNames WHERE size(typeNames) <> 1 OR sourceFileName <> head(typeNames) + '.java' RETURN source AS Source, 'exactly one top-level InspectorEntry type' AS ExpectedDirection, sourceFileName + ' -> ' + reduce(actual = '', typeName IN typeNames | CASE WHEN actual = '' THEN typeName ELSE actual + ', ' + typeName END) AS ActualDirection, 'An InspectorEntry file must define exactly one top-level adapter type.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Slotcontent InspectorEntry adapters compose only their own detail slotcontent and shell InspectorEntrySpec.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerType {viewBucket: 'INSPECTOR_ENTRY'})-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Java:Type) WITH source, target, split(source.fqn, '.') AS sourceSegments, split(target.fqn, '.') AS targetSegments WHERE target.fqn =~ 'bootstrap\\..*' OR target.fqn =~ 'src\\.data\\..*' OR target.fqn =~ 'shell\\.host\\..*' OR (target.fqn =~ 'shell\\..*' AND NOT target.fqn =~ 'shell\\.api\\.InspectorEntrySpec(\\$.*)?') OR (target.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\..*' AND NOT target.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\.[^.]+\\.published\\..+') OR ( target.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\..*' AND NOT ( ( target.viewBucket IN ['VIEW', 'INSPECTOR_ENTRY'] OR (target.viewBucket = 'MODEL' AND target.sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'ContentModel.java') ) AND size(sourceSegments) >= 5 AND size(targetSegments) >= 5 AND sourceSegments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND targetSegments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND sourceSegments[3] = 'details' AND targetSegments[3] = 'details' AND sourceSegments[3] = targetSegments[3] AND sourceSegments[4] = targetSegments[4] ) ) RETURN DISTINCT source.relativePath AS Source, coalesce(target.relativePath, target.fqn) AS Target, 'InspectorEntry adapters may use InspectorEntrySpec, own slotcontent View/ContentModel, and domain published carriers only' AS ExpectedDirection, source.fqn + ' -> ' + target.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Slotcontent InspectorEntry adapters must not become shell, service, or cross-feature composition roots.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, Target
